calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lewis Gillian, #12355.

John P. Znaghi, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff John Steward Company.
Sergei Bokof sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Joachim Bonner.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-5 Dismissed without prejudice.
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 175 Sixth Street, #404 San Francisco, CA 94103.
Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $508.80
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $315.00
for a Total Judgment of $823.80
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Ike Okwuaso.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joachim Bonner is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of April 22, 2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
